questionHtml: Hence, justify that L is a minimum when α=arctan 2.
markschemeHtml:
d2Ldα2>0 OR concave up (or equivalent)          R1

(and dLdα=0, when α=arctan 2, hence L is a minimum)

 

[1 mark]
